work.summary: Subjects taught: Mass Transfer, Heat Transfer, Fluid Flow Operations, Computational Methods, Process Equipment Design, Thermodynamics, Chemical Technology, Wastewater Treatment, Sugar & Food Technology, Applied Chemistry. Responsibilities: Mentor Coordinator, Class coordinator (Semesters II and VI), Training and Placement coordinator, BOS documentation, 1st year orientation and bridge course organizer, ABL activity coordinator. Projects guided: Food waste-based film for food packaging, biodegradable hydrogel beads for multi-dye removal and recovery.
